title: Text-Widget with Rich Text should be visible on Mobile App
excerpt: The Text-Widget allows us to use formatting and include screenshots and other media in our stories.  However the text-widget does not show on the Mobile app nor is there an associated column to show this data when in Mai…

posts.author: DH_AOS (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml: The Text-Widget allows us to use formatting and include screenshots and other media in our stories. However the text-widget does not show on the Mobile app nor is there an associated column to show this data when in Main Table or any other table style on our board. Previously we would use a rich text file attachment which was accessible on mobile and in table view as it opened the file separately. The text-widget however is simply missing and as we are capturing our Acceptance Criteria in this box we are therefore unable to effectively manage without either fully opening the ticket when in table view. We are not able to do any workaround in Mobile as it is simply missing from all views.
